titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Bottle of Smoke Records
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Describing Archives: A Content Standard

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday March 7, 2020 at 04:00

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
Box 58 (videocassette): Restricted fragile material. Consult Access Services for further information.
Box 59 (electronic media): Restricted fragile material. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Granary Books, Inc on the Ezra Pound Archive Fund, 2019.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized in seven series: I. Releases by author, 1947 - 2019. II. Work for other presses, 2004 - 2018. III. Canceled projects, 1963 - 2017. IV. Correspondence, 1963 - 2017. V. Materials related to the Guerrilla Poetics Project, 2000 - 2019. VI. Media and press, 2003 - 2019. VII. Submissions, 2001 - 2015.

bioghist.head: Bottle of Smoke Press
bioghist.p: Bottle of Smoke Press is a small press founded in 2002. The press has published works by poets including Gerard Malanga, Greg Dulli, Lawrence Ferlinghetti, Charles Bukowski, Thurston Moore, Amber Tamblyn, Kim Deitch, and many others.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Bottle of Smoke Records. Yale Collection of American Literature, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections as they are acquired, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
This collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: The Bottle of Smoke Records, which span from 1947-2019, contains correspondence, production materials, financial records, electronic media, printed material, realia, and other records relating to publications by Bottle of Smoke Press.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Bottle of Smoke Records is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials organized alphabetically by creator last name.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains files for each release from Bottle of Smoke Press including submissions, printing plates, proofs, mock ups, alternate covers, material samples, correspondence, and other materials.

did.unittitle: Menebroker, Ann and Illus by Elizabeth Roberts

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains materials of Charles Bukowski; Gerald Locklin; Michael Madsen; and Bill Roberts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains materials of Glenn W. Cooper; Adrian Manning; Ronald Baatz; A.D. Winans; Justin Barrett; Bradley Moon Hamlin; Jeffrey H. Weinberg; Evan Dashevsky; Owen Roberts; t.l. kryss; Daniel Barker; Gerald Locklin; Henry Denander; Harry R. Wilkens; Hugh Fox; Robert L. Penick; Bill R. Roberts; E. William Martin; Richard Krech; Karl Koweski; and Edward J. Rielly.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains materials of Nathan Graziano; Richard Krech; Karl Koweski; Ross Runjola; and Charles Bukowski.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials are arranged alphabetically by creator's last name.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains work related to releases from presses other than Bottle of Smoke Press including submissions, printing plates, proofs, mock ups, alternate covers, material samples, correspondence, and other materials.

did.unittitle: Ferlinghetti, Lawrence "Song of the Third World Birds"
Ferlinghetti, Lawrence "The Statue of Saint Francis"
Graziano, Nathan "For my sister on her wedding day"

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted Fragile Material. Reference copies of electronic files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials arranged alphabetically by creator's last name.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains supporting documentation for projects that were started, but never completed, including manuscripts, mock-ups, correspondence, and related materials.

did.unittitle: Burroughs, William S. and Allen Ginsberg
Kryss, Tom "Drive-by Ninja Sunflowers with Trax"
Plymell, Charles "Charles Henri Ford's Last Prints"
Plymell, Charles "S. Clay Wilson's First Publisher"
Roberts, Bill Bottle of Smoke Press

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials organized alphabetically by creator last name.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains letters, cards, notes, manuscripts, drawings, art, and related materials.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Use of originals is restricted. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: Materials related to the Guerrilla Poetics Project

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials roughly maintain order found at time of acquisition.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains works and materials created for the Guerrilla Poetics Project, along with related correspondence and ephemera.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains correspondence with Mark Sonnenfeld; Ellaraine Lockie; Eileen Patterson; A. Horvath; Phil Ambrosi; Charles P. Ries; Victor Bravo Monchego; Leonard Cirino; Doug and Dianne Holder; Luis Cuauhtemoc Berriozabal; Nancy Cooper; Diana M. Marshall; Ethel Mays; Alan Catlin; Don Winter; Christopher Cunningham; Erik Scott; Brian McGettrick; S.A. Griffin; Joan Ferrell; Richard Krech; and Ed Kauffman.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted Fragile Material. Reference copies of electronic files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials roughly maintain order found at time of acquisition.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains materials related to publicity, events, press, and interviews created by or related to Bottle of Smoke Press.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials roughly maintain order found at time of acquisition.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains submissions, ephemera, and related materials.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains submissions by David S. Pointer; Dave Donovan; Leonard Cirino; Charles P. Ries; Steve DeFrance; Michael Skau; Tom Page; Christopher Thomas; Kaitlin Ens; Ed Markowski; Arthur C. Ford Sr.; and Arthur Kimband.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains submissions by Paul F. Wolf; David Burdett; Harry Calhoun; Andrea Gereighty; John C. Krieg; Aryan Kaganof; Roger Kirschbaum; and Joe Benevento.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains submissions by Diane Webster; Greg Evason; Nita Karpf; Susan Maurer; Lorraine Tolliver; Don Moyer; Shane Jones; Fredrick Zydek; Mather Schneider; Edward Delehant Mycue; Frank Adams; D. David Sapp; Ralph E. Vaughn; Mark Sonnenfeld; Gary Lundy; M. Kettner; Debbie Kirk; Dennis Saleh; Patrico Belano; Brian Morrisey; Zachary L. Bush; Simon Perchik; Z.A. Getty; Michael Skau; Peter Jacob Streitz; Andrew Hill; John Macker; Don Winter; D.A. Levy; Thomas Michael McDade; David S. Pointer; Robert Falich; Spiel; Jim Sullivan; A. Horvath; Ryan Rowe; Chris Bodor; Tod Slone; and Dan McCoy.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains submissions by Bretton B. Holmes; S. Howe; Charles P. Ries; Debbie Kirk; Vince Droney; and Ryan D. Zirk.
